content:
I've started going through the changes, and will probably split them up. There are some things I don't understand and others I don't like, like pretty boilerplate-y JSON parsing. But I will first rebase it onto @Luke Boswell's v0.16 branch, which seems to have fixed one bug I had in the process.
But this will be slow because I don't have much spare time right now, so PR's will come when they come :upside_down:

Marking this as resolved for now, thanks for all your input!
Lukas Juhrich has marked this topic as resolved.

Sounds awesome @Lukas Juhrich I'll be happy to review anything you carve out for a PR. The 0.16.0 branch will probably see some more churn before it's ready, but if your happy to rebase on main once that lands it's probably the right call for the interim.
